highlights.text: Another consideration is the variability in sample sizes (ranging from 40 to 736) and treatment durations (from 2 weeks to 52 weeks). The optimal treatment duration for the maintenance phase can significantly influence the outcomes of interest, and longer treatment periods might reveal different results compared to shorter ones.
